features.evidence: Wifi performance is better than my old computer's ethernet. Today 01/12/2026 I added an Amazon (USBGREEN) USB-C to Lan ethernet dongle and Laptop caught it and instantly changed from Wi-Fi to wired ethernet connection.

Did have some issues as backup from previous HP Laptop, had different drivers The bloat ware MacAfee that came installed I kept on until I had downloaded windows defender (again from Microsoft Store) and installed it, then deleted it also.

Screen is clear and bright, I received this laptop and two weeks later the screen stopped working, there was no damage to it other than the screen stopped functioning, so I returned it, and the seller refuses to give a refund because the laptop was defective, which is not my fault at all!

My throughput speed is 687 MBS via (Okaloosa Speed Test) and since I have Spectrum Ultra internet at 750 MBS Max, I am satisfied with performance. Wifi performance is better than my old computer's ethernet.
Unit is currently running better than expected, much faster due to the 64GB of ram that came already installed. This was for the 512 GB storage to make it a 2.5 Terabyte of storage.
I have been trying to convert from my mouse to the touchpad, and it is easier to do with this one.
The docking station is NOT a docking station, it is a multi device connection "hub" and cannot charge the PC.
